title: AutoAFK
description: Server-side mod that automatically sets players to AFK mode after 3 minutes of inactivity, switching to spectator mode to prevent damage and hunger. Includes /afk command for manual toggling.
body:
# 🌙 AutoAFK – Smart AFK Management for Servers

**AutoAFK** is a server-side mod that automatically switches players to AFK mode after 3 minutes of inactivity. While AFK, players are put into **Spectator mode**, protecting them from hunger, damage, and death. Any player action immediately brings them back. A handy **`/afk`** command is also available for manual toggling.

---

## ✨ Features

- ⏱️ **Automatic AFK Detection**  
  Players are marked as AFK after **3 minutes of inactivity**.

- 👁️ **Spectator Mode While AFK**  
  Prevents **hunger**, **damage**, and **death** during AFK.

- 📝 **`/afk` Command**  
  Simple command for **toggling AFK status**.

- 🛡️ **Perfect for Servers**  
  Great for **managing inactive players** and **keeping them safe** while away.

---

## 📦 Compatibility

- 🧩 **Client&Server-side** — client installation required.  
- ✅ Compatible with other server-side mods and plugins.  
- 🔧 Works great for **Survival**, **RP**, **minigames**, and more.

---

## 📌 Why AutoAFK?

If you want to keep your server organized and protect players who step away, **AutoAFK** is the perfect lightweight solution. Set it and forget it — the mod handles everything for you.
